name: Token Foundation
description: Perfect for projects launching ERC-20/SPL tokens, basic staking contracts, or seeking code audits.
features: Standard ERC-20, ERC-721, or SPL Implementations

monthly.caption: A lean, security-focused contract development lane for fast token launches.

yearly.caption: Ongoing contract maintenance, security review cycles, and multi-chain updates.

name: dApp Protocol
description: Built for teams launching complete decentralised applications, custom NFT minting engines, or basic DeFi pools.
features: Subgraph & Indexer Setup for Live Data

monthly.caption: Ideal for projects needing end-to-end integration between contracts and Web3 frontend.

yearly.caption: Continuous dApp feature upgrades, cross-chain support, and wallet optimizations.

name: DeFi Protocol
description: Dedicated end-to-end blockchain engineering for custom protocols, DeFi lending, cross-chain bridges, or L2 chains.

monthly.caption: Best for companies building large-scale, high-TVL protocol architectures.

yearly.caption: Year-round contract iterations, protocol upgrades, security monitoring, and custom chain setups.
